## Explicitly forbidden scope

The following are forbidden unless this issue explicitly narrows and authorizes them:

- market-data API calls;
- broker API calls;
- order placement;
- auto trading;
- live trading;
- Strategy C;
- strategy parameter optimization;
- profitability guarantees;
- raw market data, normalized market CSV, generated candidate CSV, or generated result CSV commits;
- `data/` or `results/` commits;
- raw transcripts, subtitle full text, raw TXT/SRT/VTT caption files, caption URLs, downloaded video/audio, raw DownSub responses, or ASR output commits;
- credentials, tokens, or secrets.

## PR requirements

The PR body must include:

- objective;
- scope;
- changed files;
- guardrail statement;
- validation performed;
- next recommended task.

## Human decision required?

Choose one:

- [ ] No. This is routine and may proceed through standard automated checks.
- [ ] Yes. Human/ChatGPT review is required before merge.
